playbook.intent: In-flight designs scattered across DMs -> 1h review with decisions captured + design-system impacts queued.
playbook.scope: Designer facilitates a weekly 1-hour design review. Includes agenda intake, time-boxed walkthroughs, decision capture, action item assignment, and a design-system impact queue. Done when decisions are logged and DS impacts are queued for the system owner.

success-criteria.criterion: Agenda set 24h in advance with owners + asks
Each item gets a decision or a documented park
Action items assigned with owner + due date
Design-system impacts queued with the system owner

stage.name: Facilitate walkthroughs
stage.intent: Each item gets focus in its time box.

tasks.task: Owner walks through the work for 5 minutes
Critique grounded in heuristics + system patterns
Avoid 'I would have done X' detours

stage.decision-gate: Advance through each item within its time box.

stage.name: Force decisions
stage.intent: Decision or park; no third option.

tasks.task: For each item: decide, defer, or park with reason
Name owner + due date for any action

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each item has a written status.

stage.name: Queue DS impacts
stage.intent: Design-system changes do not slip through.

tasks.task: Flag any pattern that touches the system
Add to DS impact queue with owner
Notify system owner before end of day

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when DS owner is notified.

stage.name: Wrap + log
stage.decision-gate: Done when summary is in channel and next review is scheduled.

extra.value: [Running over time on item 1 -> later items get shortchanged, Letting critique become free-form ideas -> no decision lands, Skipping DS impact queue -> system drift creeps in]
['Did every item end with a written decision or park?', 'Are action items in the tracker with owner + due date?', 'Did the DS owner get notified about impacts?']

{human: faion get-content weekly-design-review-meeting-1hr --format md, agent: faion get-content weekly-design-review-meeting-1hr --format context, json: faion get-content weekly-design-review-meeting-1hr --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
